posts.author: Siddharth_Krishna
posts.community: Dynamic Cables - Much more dynamic in 2022?
posts.text: It’s September 26. Capacity will come live in H2FY27 (Oct ‘26 - Mar ’27)

posts.author: TKarthik
posts.community: Dynamic Cables - Much more dynamic in 2022?
posts.text: I noticed there is a confusion as to when the new production capacity goes live. The con call mentions Sep 2027 versus the call/transcript says Sep 2026. Did we receive any clarification about this?
